rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0010
rows.name: Yo, how's it going?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0020
rows.name: Terrible, of course. How about you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0030
rows.name: Better than you, which means terrific.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0040
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Did you hear that answer just now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0050
rows.name: Yes, it seems it was just as you expected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0070
rows.name: Yeah[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0080
rows.name: But why did you leave the decision to them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0090
rows.name: If I fall,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0100
rows.name: I can entrust the future of humanity to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0110
rows.name: Because they are that kind of person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0120
rows.name: That doesn't sound like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0130
rows.name: Right now, what we need is someone[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0140
rows.name: with the resolve to love absolutely everything in this world[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0150
rows.name: Someone who can inherit that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0160
rows.name: You want another you, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0170
rows.name: Like the you who rushed out in the Ares when we escaped Earth[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0180
rows.name: Ignoring my attempts to stop you[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0190
rows.name: Al...![ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0200
rows.name: I'm leaving the evacuation of the refugees to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0210
rows.name: I'll protect the ship from the outside.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0220
rows.name: The enemy numbers are overwhelming[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0230
rows.name: You can't change the situation with just one Ares![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0240
rows.name: We won't know unless I try![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0250
rows.name: Al[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0260
rows.name: I'll charge in from here and carve open a path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0270
rows.name: I'll protect every last one of you[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0280
rows.name: The people of Earth[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0290
rows.name: I won't let it end here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32170100_MSG0300
rows.name: You're right[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
